use_cases: Product onboarding tours to guide new users through features
Step-by-step feature walkthroughs with contextual highlights
User guidance overlays for complex workflows
Contextual help dialogs triggered by user actions
ai_summary: A tour and onboarding overlay component built on Radix UI primitives providing accessible modal dialogs with smooth fade and zoom animations. Designed for guided user experiences, product tours, and step-by-step feature walkthroughs with customizable tour steps and overlay styling.
